albums.title: Electric Empath
albums.description: Includes Electric Brew, Forty Three, and Canopy Dreamer — a track about Thistlewink meeting a tree kangaroo in the canopy.

albums.title: Crafting Songs
albums.description: Includes Pineapple Halo and Procrochetinator — music made for the same hands that hold a crochet hook.

albums.title: I Make Magic
albums.description: A single about the quiet spellwork of making things by hand.

albums.title: Coffee
albums.description: A warm, quiet single for slow mornings.

albums.title: Procrastinator
albums.description: A cheeky single about putting things off — perfect company for anyone mid-scroll instead of mid-task.

albums.title: Pineapple Halo
albums.description: A bold, playful single — pineapple on pizza and proud of it.

albums.title: Forty Three
albums.description: A warm, tender single about love that's settled into itself.

albums.title: Women Who Write
albums.description: A tribute to the storytellers and word-weavers making their own magic.
